# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionMaxDistance property

Distance from the emitter at which air absorption filtering reaches its maximum effect. The filter interpolates between min and max cutoff frequencies over this range.

```csharp
public float AirAbsorptionMaxDistance { get; set; }
```
